creator: marc+freebsd8bug@milestonerdl.com
text:
FreeBSD 6.2 RELEASE works.
FreeBSD 7.0 install CD ROM complains about intrrupt storm on irq 6 and works.

8.1 BETA 1 CD ROM will not boot without hardware change.    Verbose boot says:

carbus1: <simple comms> at device 0.1 (no driver attached)
pccard0: CIS version PC Card Standard 5.0
pccard0: CIS info: IBM Corporation, IBM High Rate Wireless LAN PC Card,   
Version 01.01,
pccard0: manufacturer code 0x156, product 0x2
pccard0: function 0: network adapter, ccr addr 0x3e0 mask 0x1
pccard0: function 0, config table entry 1: I/O card; irq mask 0xffff;
iomask 0x6, iospace 0-0x3f; io16 irqpulse irqlevel

And that is the end of the output.

Fix: 

Disassemble laptop  (losing screws optional)
Remove wireless  FRU  08K3309  from card slot
(be nice if it was fixed.)
How-To-Repeat: Find Dinosaur.   Take the thinkpad i1300 1171-5XU the dinosaur has.
Insert FreeBSD 8.1 Beta 1 CD ROM and attempt boot.
